overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a medieval stone courtyard or cloister, likely from a fantasy RPG. Students in dark robes with red accents gather around wooden tables beneath heavy timber beams, while the camera maintains a static elevated perspective overlooking the semi-covered walkway and arched opening to green countryside beyond.

segments.scene_description: A static elevated view of a medieval stone courtyard arcade with heavy timber roofing. Robed figures resembling students move between wooden tables beneath the covered walkway, while one figure with a red collar stands prominently in the foreground. Through the large stone archway, green rolling hills are visible in the distance. The scene maintains consistent natural lighting throughout with characters exhibiting subtle ambient animations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective over a medieval stone courtyard that blends the structured enclosure of a cloister with a glimpse of the open wilderness. It begins by overlooking a covered arcade where students in dark robes move between heavy wooden tables beneath massive timber beams. As the camera lingers, the focus settles on a figure with a red collar standing prominently in the foreground amidst the subtle ambient movements of the gathering. The scene then expands visually through a large stone archway, drawing the eye from the shadowed interior toward the bright, green rolling hills in the distance.
